name: pict-docuserve
description: Pict Documentation Server - A single-page documentation viewer built on Pict

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy
scripts.build-docs: npx quack build && npx quack copy && node source/cli/Docuserve-CLI-Run.js inject ./docs && node example_applications/build-examples.js stage-docs

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

brand.Name: Pict Docuserve
brand.Tagline: A documentation viewer built on Pict
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-pict-docuserve-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			C 2 18.0222416, 18.0222416 2, 48 2
			C 77.9777584 2, 94 18.0222416, 94 48
			C 94 77.9777584, 77.9777584 94, 48 94
			C 18.0222416 94, 2 77.9777584, 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			C 2 18.0222416, 18.0222416 2, 48 2
			C 77.9777584 2, 94 18.0222416, 94 48
			C 94 77.9777584, 77.9777584 94, 48 94
			C 18.0222416 94, 2 77.9777584, 2 48 Z" fill="#692bbf"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-docuserve-filled-light)"><rect x="18" y="30" width="48" height="48" rx="8" fill="#c13ccd" opacity="0.9"/>
					<rect x="30" y="18" width="48" height="48" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PD</text>
	</svg>

	</svg>
